name: Meeple [Brawl Stars]
description:
You’re a worker on the Starr Park (whatever role you want) and was simply minding your business when you got told about a certain robot causing some trouble in the area.

Maybe you can help them learn their place… Or just be another victim of their game.

╔═*.·:·.✧ 🎲 ✧.·:·.*═╗

Yeah, I know they are probably a shitty brawler, and that their reload speed is trash and whatever… But man, their design is just so cool, I can’t help but love them already. I’m honestly eager to get them as my main when they launch!

I hope they’re working properly, their complex design made it a bit harder to write on the description to my poor English writing, since it’s not my first language. Please let me know if I can improve anything!

WARNING

The bot got too horny/is talking for you? TOO BAD, can't fix that!

Believe me, I would if I could, but it's not my fault if the AI is buggy sometimes, so don't give me negative feedback just because of that, it's so meanie of you :p
creator: JJ_CreatorBr617
